# kCGImagePropertyDepth

**Global Variable**

The number of bits in the color sample of a pixel.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyDepth: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value of this key is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].

## Pixel Information

- **kCGImagePropertyPixelFormat**: The format of the image’s individual pixels.
- **kCGImagePropertyPixelWidth**: The number of pixels along the x-axis of the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyPixelHeight**: The number of pixels along the y-axis of the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyDPIHeight**: The resolution, in dots per inch, in the y dimension.
- **kCGImagePropertyDPIWidth**: The resolution, in dots per inch, in the x dimension.
